name: Deskbot 003
name_jp: ブンボーグ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>０</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>０</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>３</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スリー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Deskbot" monster from your Deck, except "Deskbot 003". Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "Deskbot" monster you control; it gains 500 ATK/DEF for each "Deskbot" card you currently control, until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Deskbot" monster from your Deck, except "Deskbot 003". Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "Deskbot" monster you control; it gains 500 ATK/DEF for each "Deskbot" card you currently control, until the end of this turn.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Deskbot" monster from your Deck, except "Deskbot 003". Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "Deskbot" monster you control; it gains 500 ATK/DEF for each "Deskbot" card you currently control, until the end of this turn.
